creator: krolk@web.de
text:
hi

after ports tree and sftp update 

# portsnap fetch update
# pkg_info | grep sinfp
sinfp-2.06_20071229 Full operating system stack fingerprinting suite


I get the following error:

# sinfp -i host
P1: B10113 F0x12 W5840 O0204ffff M1460
P2: B10113 F0x12 W5792 O0204ffff0402080affffffff4445414401030304 M1460
P3: B10120 F0x04 W0 O0 M0
IPv4: unknown
Undefined subroutine &Net::Pcapdump called at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Net/Packet/Dump.pm line 561.
